properties.name: Philmont Scout Ranch
properties.description: Scouting America's premier high adventure base covering 140,000 acres in the Rocky Mountains of northeastern New Mexico.

properties.name: Northern Tier High Adventure
properties.description: Canoeing and wilderness adventures in the Boundary Waters of northern Minnesota and Canada.

properties.name: Florida Sea Base
properties.description: Aquatic high adventure programs including sailing, scuba diving, and kayaking in the Florida Keys.

properties.name: Summit Bechtel Reserve
properties.description: Home of the National Scout Jamboree, offering zip lines, mountain biking, skateboarding, and more in southern West Virginia.

properties.name: Camp Meriwether
properties.description: Oceanfront Scout camp on the Oregon coast near Tillamook Head.

properties.name: Camp Treasure Island
properties.description: Island camp on the Allegheny River offering aquatics and traditional Scouting programs.

properties.name: Camp Rainey Mountain
properties.description: Mountain camp in the foothills of the Blue Ridge Mountains in northeast Georgia.

properties.name: Camp Upham Woods
properties.description: Year-round outdoor education center along the Wisconsin River near the Dells.

properties.name: Camp Steiner
properties.description: High-mountain Scout camp in the Uinta Mountains of Utah at over 10,000 feet elevation.

properties.name: Swamp Base
properties.description: Louisiana Swamp Base is a national conservation and high adventure recreation program created in 2010 by the Evangeline Area Council, Scouting America to commemorate the Centennial of Scouting while also making a 100 year commitment to annually immerse thousands of youth in the environment and culture of the Atchafalaya Swamp.
